short_term.action: Enforce no-entry time windows for heavy-duty diesel trucks in dense urban corridors using ANPR-based monitoring
short_term.evidence: EPA diesel control strategies show 20–40% PM reduction from restricting HDV access

short_term.action: Deploy corridor-level synchronized traffic signals to minimize stop-go cycles and idling emissions
short_term.evidence: World Bank ITS programs show 15–30% emission reduction from signal optimization

short_term.action: Implement temporary congestion pricing during high AQI episodes in core zones
short_term.evidence: OECD congestion pricing reduces traffic emissions by 20–40%

short_term.action: Restrict on-road parking on arterial roads to improve traffic flow and reduce idling
short_term.evidence: World Bank urban mobility studies show 10–25% emission reduction from improved flow

short_term.action: Mandate periodic pollution under control (PUC) checks with digital verification for commercial fleets
short_term.evidence: NCAP indicates 20–30% emission reduction from strict vehicle inspection

long_term.action: Electrify public bus fleets with depot charging and grid integration
long_term.evidence: World Bank and UNEP report 60–90% emission reduction from electric buses

long_term.action: Develop metro and BRT corridors integrated with feeder systems to shift modal share
long_term.evidence: World Bank transit systems reduce transport emissions by 40–70%

long_term.action: Implement city-wide low emission zones requiring Euro VI or EV compliance
long_term.evidence: EU and UNEP studies show 30–60% PM reduction in LEZ zones

long_term.action: Promote non-motorized transport infrastructure including protected cycle lanes
long_term.evidence: WHO urban mobility shows 15–35% reduction in vehicular emissions

long_term.action: Implement transit-oriented development zoning to reduce travel distances
long_term.evidence: OECD land-use policies reduce transport emissions by 30–50%

short_term.action: Deploy vacuum-based mechanical road sweepers on major corridors twice daily
short_term.evidence: NCAP shows 20–40% PM10 reduction from mechanical sweeping

short_term.action: Mandate water spraying at construction and demolition sites every 4 hours
short_term.evidence: CPCB and NCAP show 20–35% dust suppression

short_term.action: Enforce covering of construction materials during transport using tarpaulin

long_term.action: Pave all unpaved roads and shoulders to prevent dust resuspension
long_term.evidence: World Bank studies show 40–70% PM reduction

long_term.action: Develop green buffers and roadside vegetation barriers
long_term.evidence: WHO urban greening reduces particulate exposure by 20–40%

short_term.action: Strictly prohibit open waste burning with ward-level enforcement squads
short_term.evidence: WHO shows 50–80% PM reduction from eliminating open burning

long_term.action: Universal adoption of LPG/electric cooking through subsidy targeting
long_term.evidence: UNEP clean cooking reduces emissions by 70–90%

short_term.action: Mandate continuous emission monitoring systems (CEMS) with real-time compliance penalties

long_term.action: Transition to cleaner fuels such as natural gas or electrification in industrial processes

short_term.action: Control VOC emissions at fuel stations using vapor recovery systems
short_term.evidence: EPA vapor recovery reduces VOC emissions by 30–50%

long_term.action: Reduce NOx emissions through electrification of transport and industrial boilers
long_term.evidence: UNEP atmospheric chemistry shows 40–70% ozone reduction
